title: What to Do If You Lose Your Passport in China
metaDescription: Steps to take if you lose your passport while traveling in China. Stay calm, report it, and get help from authorities.

sections.heading: h1
sections.content: Stay calm and retrace your steps. Check your hotel safe, bags, and last known location. Time is important, so act quickly once you confirm it's truly lost.

sections.heading: h2
sections.content: Report the loss to the local police station immediately. File a report and obtain a copy of the official loss report—you will need this for all next steps.

sections.heading: h3
sections.content: Contact your country's embassy or consulate in China. They will guide you on applying for an emergency travel document to get you home safely.

keyTakeaways: Report to local police and get a written report.
Contact your embassy or consulate for an emergency passport.
Keep digital copies of your passport and important documents separate from the originals.
